race.comment: Open race to close out the card. BIT OF GRUNT (7) doesn't win out of turn but has placed three of four over this course and distance and is usually thereabouts. Will be rock-hard fit for this and should be hitting the line with gusto. LOCH AWE (6) will be better with that first-up run under the belt and looks a must for the exotics players. ECHO HUNTER (8) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be underestimated. NOVEMBER AIR (14) obviously wasn't right last start and is clearly worth another chance. Effort two back at Newcastle rates well and she has to be kept safe.
